title: Lesson 1140: 突っ張る, 筒, 慎む...

items.gloss: to cramp up; to tighten; to stiffen; to be insistent; to persist (in one's opinion); to stick to one's guns; to act tough; to bluff; to be defiant; to be unruly; to prop up (e.g. with a post); to support; to push out (one's legs or arms); to stretch (e.g. an arm against the wall); to press; to thrust (one's opponent)
pipe; tube; cylinder; gun barrel; gun; cannon; well lining; well curb
to be careful; to be discreet; to do in moderation; to refrain (from overdoing); to abstain; to be reverent; to be purified; to be chaste
verbal message; word (from someone); rumour; rumor
to be fit for; to be equal to; to function properly
